metadata.title: Expense Tracker
metadata.description: Track your expenses with ease using our intuitive expense tracker app built with Next.js and NeonDB.

hero.subtitle: Track expenses, set budgets, and gain insights into your spending habits with our intuitive expense tracking platform.
hero.feature1Desc: Quickly add and categorize your expenses with our simple interface
hero.feature2Desc: Get detailed reports and insights about your spending patterns
hero.feature3Desc: Set budgets and track your progress towards financial goals

foreverFree.heading: Completely Free, Forever
foreverFree.subtitle: No catches, no trials, no premium upsells. Full expense tracking for everyone.
foreverFree.item1Desc: No premium plans, no surprise charges, no credit card required
foreverFree.item2Desc: Get the complete expense tracking experience at zero cost
foreverFree.item3Desc: Clean, distraction-free interface focused on your finances

quickStart.heading: Get Started in 30 Seconds
quickStart.subtitle: Three simple steps to better financial tracking
quickStart.step1Desc: Just your email, no payment info needed
quickStart.step2Desc: Coffee, lunch, gas - track it all

features.heading: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Powerful features that don't cost a penny
features.visualReportsDesc: Charts and graphs to visualize your spending patterns clearly
features.smartCategoriesDesc: Automatically categorize your expenses with intelligent suggestions
features.multipleAccountsDesc: Track expenses across cash, credit cards, and bank accounts
features.monthlyBudgetsDesc: Set spending limits and monitor your progress towards goals
features.searchFilterDesc: Find any expense quickly with powerful search and filters
features.mobileFriendlyDesc: Perfect responsive design that works seamlessly on any device

trust.heading: Your Data is Protected
trust.secureDesc: HTTPS encryption and secure database storage protect your information
trust.privacyDesc: Your expense data is yours - we don't share or sell your information

cta.heading: Ready to Take Control?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands who've transformed their finances with our free expense tracker

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes! No trials, no premium plans, no hidden fees. We believe everyone deserves access to good financial tools.
faq.q2: Does this app make any profit?
faq.a2: We don't! This is a passion project combining our love for financial empowerment and software development. We believe everyone deserves access to quality financial tools.
faq.a3: Yes! We use HTTPS encryption for data in transit and secure database storage. Your personal financial information is never shared with third parties.
faq.q4: Can I use it on my phone?
faq.a4: Yes! Our web app works perfectly on mobile.

budgetVsActual.heading: Budget vs actual
budgetVsActual.empty: No budgets set this month. Head to Budgets to add one.

modal.newDescription: Add a new transaction to your records.
modal.importDescription: Bulk import transactions in csv file, currently support csv format from Nordea

list.empty: No categories yet. Create a category first to budget for it.

deleteConfirm.title: Remove budget for "{category}"?
deleteConfirm.description: This only removes the budget for this month. Transactions are untouched.

form.newDescription: Create a new category to track spending.
form.name: Name

card.transactionCount: {count, plural, one {# transaction} other {# transactions}} this month

grid.empty: No categories yet. Create one to start tracking.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete "{name}"?
deleteConfirm.description: Transactions in this category will keep their data but lose the link.
